evals.prompt: I just got a new product: Niacinamide Brightening Serum. Category is skincare. Build me a TikTok Shop video shooting plan in English with a clear hook, shot-by-shot list, and soft conversion.
evals.expected_output: Map category to beauty-skincare and return structured markdown with Video Brief, Hook Options (2), Shot List (6-8 shots with six required columns), Conversion Design (soft CTA), Compliance Notes.

evals.prompt: Product: Portable Smoothie Blender. Category: small appliance. Give me a practical 30-45s TikTok Shop script. I want at least one comparison shot if it makes sense.
evals.expected_output: Map category to tech-small-appliance, include at least one comparison shot when strategy says comparison_recommended=true, keep 6-8 shots and soft CTA tone.

evals.prompt: I need a quick sell-video structure for Cat Feather Teaser. Category: pet toy. Keep it executable and in English.
evals.expected_output: Set category_normalized to generic, use fallback generic strategy, keep the same markdown structure, and include Fallback Note: Used generic strategy due to unmatched category.
